title: Nemo's More Ladder Variants (MStV+)
description: Ladder Blocks for every kind of wood as a standalone version from the mod "Nemo's Carpentry"
body:
![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/res2q.png)

[![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Stick-Variants/badge/requires-mstv-yellow.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-stick-variants)

---
# More Ladder Variants 

Certainly any wood is suitable for ladder building - try it out!  
Thanks to [Nemo's Carpentry](https://modrinth.com/mod/nemos-carpentry), ladders are now available in all the colors of the forest.

<details><summary>What if I already have Nemo's Carpentry installed?</summary>
Then this mod is fairly but not completely useless because it ensures compatibility with More Stick Variants (MStV) and provides ladder variant recipes for the crafting table. It also makes it compatible with Quad 1.3.0's block replacement feature as can be seen below.
</details>

![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/tw2dp.png)

## Adding 11 new ladders (incl. Pale Oak) to Minecraft.  

## Compatible with [Quad](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad) 1.3.0+'s block replacement:
![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/6zi3u.png)  
Looking through the window of a desert village fletcher: We can see that instead of _Oak Ladder_, _Oak Torch_ and _Birch Fletching Table_, the game now generates the village with a _**Jungle Ladder**_, a _**Jungle Torch**_ (from [More Torch Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-torch-variants)) and a _**Jungle Fletching Table**_ (from [More Fletching Tables](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-fletching-tables)).
